title: Trying to delete a non-existent ›has-video‹ relationship
gherkin:
Given there exists a "MAGAZINE" "Top Gear"
And there exists a "VIDEO" "Promo Video"
And there exists NO "has-video" relationship between "Top Gear" and "Promo Video"
When the user deletes the "has-video" relationship between "Top Gear" and "Promo Video"
Then the request should be rejected with status code 404
